title: Funerary epitaph for Stateios Eutyches
support: Marble plaque irregularly cut back on each side. Currently set in plaster.

layout.p: six lines of Greek letters with a consistent left margin, and a slight gap between lines 1-3 and lines 4-6.

handNote.lettering: Simply cut letters without serifs. Quadrate epsilon, lunate quadrate sigma, rhomboid omega, mu with very short middle strokes. Use of stigma in numerals, and interpuncts to separate numerals.

provenanceFound._: First recorded by Torremuzza 1784, who states that it was dug up in Taormina, and then transferred to the Museo Biscari (so also Ferrara). Now in the Museo Civico di Catania
